MOTION Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default Judgment And To Set Aside Default;
Off Calendar Apr-23-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Philip S. Horne, Esq., ATTORNEY AT LAW, (415) 235-7445, appeared on behalf of defendant and moving party Brandi Boiles. Robert M. Menchini, Esq., LAW OFFICES OF ROBER MENCHINI, specially appearing for the Law Offices of Michael Hall, on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party James Blanding.

Parties agree to set aside default. Defendant BRANDI BOILES' motion to vacate default judgment and to set aside default GRANTED. Parties agree that defendant shall answer complaint within five days. Personal service on counsel. Defendant agrees to accept service through her attorney. Order signed in open court. (JJM/CL) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855
